subcodes.title: Words to Mrs. Emma Blum, spoken on 1912-10-07
subcodes.first_line: My admonition to you is this. Be thoughtful of attaining to that which was the utmost desire of the Saints. Strive with all your heart and soul to attain to the Kingdom of God.
subcodes.subjects: @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @spiritual transformation, @exhortations and counsels
